2603.17312.title: Recurrent Reasoning with Vision-Language Models for Estimating Long-Horizon Embodied Task Progress
2603.17312.paper_summary: Accurately estimating task progress is critical for embodied agents to plan and execute long-horizon, multi-step tasks. Despite promising advances, existing Vision-Language Models (VLMs) based methods primarily leverage their video understanding capabilities, while neglecting their complex reasoning potential. Furthermore, processing long video trajectories with VLMs is computationally prohibitive for real-world deployment. To address these challenges, we propose the Recurrent Reasoning Vision-Language Model ($\text{R}^2$VLM). Our model features a recurrent reasoning framework that processes local video snippets iteratively, maintaining a global context through an evolving Chain of Thought (CoT). This CoT explicitly records task decomposition, key steps, and their completion status, enabling the model to reason about complex temporal dependencies. This design avoids the high cost of processing long videos while preserving essential reasoning capabilities. We train $\text{R}^2$VLM on large-scale, automatically generated datasets from ALFRED and Ego4D. Extensive experiments on progress estimation and downstream applications, including progress-enhanced policy learning, reward modeling for reinforcement learning, and proactive assistance, demonstrate that $\text{R}^2$VLM achieves strong performance and generalization, achieving a new state-of-the-art in long-horizon task progress estimation. The models and benchmarks are publicly available at \href{https://huggingface.co/collections/zhangyuelin/r2vlm}{huggingface}.
2603.17312.paper_summary_zh: 準確估計任務進度對於具身代理來說，對於計劃和執行長期、多步驟的任務至關重要。儘管有令人鼓舞的進展，現有的基於視覺-語言模型（VLMs）的方法主要利用其視頻理解能力，而忽略了其複雜推理潛力。此外，使用VLM處理長視頻軌跡在實際部署中計算成本過高。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了遞迴推理視覺-語言模型（$\text{R}^2$VLM）。我們的模型具有一個遞迴推理框架，通過不斷迭代處理局部視頻片段，並通過不斷演變的思維鏈（CoT）保持全局上下文。這個CoT明確記錄任務分解、關鍵步驟及其完成狀態，使模型能夠推理複雜的時間依賴性。這一設計避免了處理長視頻的高成本，同時保留了基本的推理能力。我們在來自ALFRED和Ego4D的大規模自動生成數據集上訓練$\text{R}^2$VLM。對進度估計和下游應用的廣泛實驗，包括進度增強的策略學習、強化學習的獎勵建模和主動協助，證明$\text{R}^2$VLM實現了強大的性能和泛化能力，在長期任務進度估計中達到了新的最先進水平。模型和基準數據集可在\href{https://huggingface.co/collections/zhangyuelin/r2vlm}{huggingface}上公開獲取。
2603.17312.author: Yuelin Zhang et.al.
2603.17312.authors: Yuelin Zhang, Sijie Cheng, Chen Li, Zongzhao Li, Yuxin Huang, Yang Liu, Wenbing Huang
